form.formComment: Second-up today. Last start won by 0.5 len at Antalya March 19 over 1400m defeating Tarcan Baba carrying 54kg at $13.25. At only start last preparation 4th of 9 at this track on January 14 over 1500m, 6 len behind Menkar with 58kg at $6.15. This is tougher so prefer others.
